action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the current environmental state from the reactor sensors, including temperature, reactant/product concentrations, and current hardware settings.

action_set_definitions.name: set_cooling_valve
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the cooling jacket valve position. 0.0 is fully closed, 100.0 is fully open.

action_set_definitions.name: set_heating_power
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power of the internal heating element in kilowatts.

action_set_definitions.name: set_stirrer_rpm
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the agitation speed of the reactor stirrer.

action_set_definitions.name: set_feed_rate_b
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the dosing rate of Reactant B into the reactor.

state_description.reactor_temperature_k: Internal temperature of the reactants in Kelvin.
state_description.internal_pressure_bar: Total pressure inside the reactor vessel in bar.
state_description.reactant_a_concentration: Current concentration of Reactant A in mol/L.
state_description.reactant_b_concentration: Current concentration of Reactant B in mol/L.
state_description.product_concentration: Current concentration of the target product in mol/L.
state_description.jacket_temperature_k: Temperature of the cooling/heating jacket fluid in Kelvin.
state_description.stirrer_speed_rpm: Rotational speed of the internal agitator in Revolutions Per Minute.
state_description.cooling_valve_pos: Current position of the cooling water valve (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.heating_element_power_kw: Current power output of the electric heating element in kilowatts.
state_description.elapsed_process_time_s: Total time elapsed since the start of the batch in seconds.
